query: Use /skill-issue to turn these preserved failures and assertions into the smallest valid release-note skill.
Invoke the Skill Issue skill to audit this bloated SKILL.md and rewrite it around one action-shaped primitive.
/skill-issue choose the correct core primitive for this support dispatcher and keep the bare core under twenty body lines.
Please use Skill Issue as the named form workflow for this new user-invoked deployment skill.
Activate /skill-issue and externalize the branch-only source policy without shipping eval evidence inside the skill.
I explicitly want the Skill Issue skill to check whether every Details line was earned by a bare-core failure.
Run /skill-issue on skills/archive-note/SKILL.md and record the manual frontmatter check when the validator is unavailable.
Call skill-issue to decide whether this classifier needs a Router or a Switch, then write the exact mandated form.
/skill-issue repair this Recipe so every numbered item contains one imperative and no nested bullets.
Use the Skill Issue skill to produce a compact model-invoked skill description with trigger conditions and exclusions only.
Use /skill-creator to evaluate and optimize this existing skill across paired benchmark runs.
Open a GitHub issue describing why the authentication skill fails on expired tokens.
This is a skill issue, not a tooling issue—the engineer needs more practice with the debugger.
Review this SKILL.md for spelling and broken Markdown links without changing its structure.
Use the release-note skill to draft notes for commits v2.1.0..HEAD.
Explain the difference between a checklist and a recipe in ordinary prose with two examples.
Rewrite this GitHub issue so it has clearer reproduction steps and acceptance criteria.
Create a new agent skill for invoice categorization; choose whatever format seems clearest.
Do not invoke Skill Issue. Just tell me whether 120 lines is too long for this file.
Fix the Python TypeError in skill_issue.py and add a regression test.
